meaning: n.[解]骨性联接 骨结合
examples: Objective to analyze the efficacy and complications of the surgical correction of exophthalmos in craniofacial synostosis.
Objective: to study the procedure and indication in the surgical treatment of congenital proximal radio-ulnar joint synostosis.
Conclusion: Derotation osteotomy is an effective procedure in the treatment of congenital proximal radio-ulnar joint synostosis.
